overview: Based on the published agenda, this Wausau School District Board of Education regular meeting was scheduled primarily to address closed session matters related to potential litigation under Wisconsin State Statute 19.85(g). The brief agenda indicates the board was expected to conduct preliminary discussions regarding legal matters in closed session before potentially reconvening in open session to take any necessary action.

agenda.item: Request for Closed Session Pursuant to State Statutes
Reconvene in Open Session, to take further action if necessary and appropriate

discussions.body: The board was scheduled to enter closed session to conduct preliminary discussions regarding potential litigation, as permitted under Wisconsin State Statute 19.85(g). This statute allows governmental bodies to meet in closed session when conferring with legal counsel concerning litigation strategy.
Following the closed session discussion, the board was expected to reconvene in open session to take any further action deemed necessary and appropriate based on the closed session deliberations.

publicComment: No public comment period was included on this agenda.
actionItems: Board was expected to potentially take action following closed session discussions regarding potential litigation
title: Regular Meeting - 2026-04-27
